hero.title: Your press kit in 5 minutes.
hero.tagline: Build a public press kit page with your bio, photos, tracks, social links, and download link — all on your own presskit.pro/your-name URL.
hero.ctaHint: Free for 14 days. No credit card.

whatIsPressKit.title: Everything a booker needs to close.
whatIsPressKit.body: A press kit pulls your bio, professional photos, featured tracks, social links, and contact info into a single page — ready to send to any venue, festival, or producer. PressKit Pro delivers it on a short link, optimized for SEO and lightweight on mobile.

steps.title: Reserve your link
steps.body: Pick presskit.pro/your-name during onboarding. We hold it for 7 days while you finish signup.

steps.title: Build your press kit
steps.body: Upload a bio, photos, tracks, social links, and a link to your high-res assets. No code, no fiddly templates.

steps.title: Share
steps.body: Send the link to bookers, festivals, or in DMs. Update whenever you want; the link never changes.

examples.title: Get inspired by artists already live.
examples.empty: No published profiles yet. Run `pnpm seed` in dev to populate examples.

pricingTeaser.title: $5/month. Everything included.
pricingTeaser.body: Hosting, the presskit.pro/your-name URL, unlimited updates, support in PT/EN/ES. Cancel anytime.

items.q: Do I need to know how to code?
items.a: No. The editor is fully visual. Your press kit goes live in 5 minutes.

items.q: Can I use my own domain?
items.a: On the current plan the link is presskit.pro/your-name. Custom domains land in the next product phase.
Yes. You paste your Drive/Dropbox link and we verify it's public before saving.
Yes — desktop, mobile, and tablet. Public pages score 95+ on Lighthouse mobile.
Portuguese, English, and Spanish via the language toggle in the footer.

items.q: Can I unpublish at any time?
items.a: Yes. Unpublishing removes the page immediately — the public link returns 404.

pressKitWarning.subject: Heads up: your press-kit link may be broken
pressKitWarning.body: Hi! Your press-kit link ({url}) failed our last two automated checks. Please open the link and confirm it's still publicly accessible. If it keeps failing, we'll hide the download button on your public page after the next check. — The PressKit Pro team

pressKitBroken.subject: Press-kit link hidden — action needed
pressKitBroken.body: Hi! Your press-kit link ({url}) failed three checks in a row, so we hid the download button on your public page to avoid sending bookers to a broken link. Update the link in the editor to re-enable the download. — The PressKit Pro team

slugReclaimWarning.subject: Heads up: your presskit.pro/{slug} link may be released in 7 days

slugReclaimReleased.subject: Your presskit.pro/{slug} link has been released
slugReclaimReleased.body: Hi! As stated in the previous notice, the link presskit.pro/{slug} has been released due to inactivity. Your account is intact — you can claim a new slug from the editor anytime. — The PressKit Pro team

keepSuccess.title: Slug saved!
keepSuccess.body: presskit.pro/{slug} is yours to keep. Happy press-kitting!

privacySettings.title: Privacy
privacySettings.intro: Export your data or delete your account anytime, in line with LGPD.

export.title: Export my data
export.body: We'll generate a ZIP with everything you've published (profiles, content, photos, links, and analytics) and email you a download link. The link expires in 24 hours.
export.pending: Preparing your archive... We'll email you when it's ready.

delete.title: Delete my account
delete.body: Your account enters a 14-day window before permanent deletion. During that time your press kit is taken offline (public link returns 404). After 14 days we remove your data from Auth, Storage, Stripe, and analytics.
delete.confirmBody: To confirm, type your email below. This starts the 14-day window.
delete.errorEmail: Email does not match. Confirm exactly as it appears on your account.
delete.successBanner: Account marked for deletion. You've been signed out and your profiles are offline. Contact support within 14 days if you want to cancel the deletion.

profile.fallbackBanner: Original content in {language}. A translation in your language is not yet available.

social.label: Social media
social.heading: Follow
social.asideHeading:
Tap a channel
close the booking.
social.asideHint: Every link opens in a new tab. The DMs are open.

consent.body: We only use essential cookies — login session and language preference. No tracking or advertising cookies.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This policy describes how PressKit Pro collects, uses, and protects your personal data when you use the service. By creating an account or browsing the public pages, you agree to the terms of this policy.

sections.heading: Data we collect
sections.body: We collect the email you provide at signup and the content you publish in your press kit (bio, photos, links, tracks). We do not collect location, device, or browsing data for advertising purposes.

sections.heading: Cookies
sections.body: We only use essential cookies: the authentication session cookie and the language preference cookie. We do not set tracking or advertising cookies. The `cookie_consent` cookie stores your acknowledgment of this notice.

sections.heading: Sharing
sections.body: We do not sell or rent your data. We only share with providers essential to the service (hosting, payment processing) under contracts with confidentiality obligations.

sections.heading: Your rights (LGPD)
sections.body: You can access, correct, export, or delete your data at any time. Self-serve export and deletion ship in the next version (task-33). Until then, write to contato@presskit.pro.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: These terms govern the use of PressKit Pro. By creating an account, you accept the conditions below. If you do not agree, do not use the service.

sections.heading: Account and content
sections.body: You are responsible for the content you publish in your press kit, including rights to photos, tracks, and text. Content that infringes third-party rights, violates laws, or is offensive may be removed without prior notice.

sections.heading: Plan and billing
sections.body: PressKit Pro offers a 14-day free trial. After that, a paid plan is required to keep the press kit live. Cancellation can be made at any time and takes effect at the end of the billing cycle.

sections.heading: Slug and public link
sections.body: The presskit.pro/your-name URL is reserved while your account is active. After prolonged inactivity, the slug may be released per the recycling policy (task-32).

sections.heading: Suspension and termination
sections.body: We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms. In the case of termination for violation, no pro-rated refunds are issued.

sections.heading: Limitation of liability
sections.body: The service is provided "as is". We do not guarantee continuous availability, although we strive to meet SLAs aligned with the plan tier.

sections.heading: Governing law and venue
sections.body: These terms are governed by the laws of the Federative Republic of Brazil. The courts of São Paulo - SP are the agreed venue for any disputes.

seo.siteDescription: Build a public press kit with your bio, photos, tracks, links, and contact — ready to send to bookers, festivals, and clubs. PT/EN/ES.

pricing.title: Plans & pricing
pricing.description: 14-day trial, then Pro at $5/month: presskit.pro/your-name URL, unlimited updates, support in PT/EN/ES. Cancel anytime.

privacy.description: How PressKit Pro collects, uses, and protects your data — essential cookies only, LGPD-compliant, no tracking.

terms.description: Terms of use for PressKit Pro: account, published content, plan and billing, slug and public link, suspension, Brazilian jurisdiction.

mediakit-pro-v1.name: Hard Techno Underground
mediakit-pro-v1.tagline: Underground rave aesthetic: pure black, electric cobalt, ghost-outlined title and a high-voltage marquee.

festival-club-orange.name: Festival Club Orange
festival-club-orange.tagline: Festival and club energy: light cream, electric orange, layered hero, and a high-voltage marquee.

editorial-nightlife-v1.name: Editorial Nightlife
editorial-nightlife-v1.tagline: The original PressKit Pro look: brutalist editorial, high contrast.

design.heading: Pick a design preset
design.description: Each preset swaps the entire visual treatment of your page: colors, typography, hero, socials, press-kit, and contact. You can still tweak color + type later under "Theme".
design.applyHint: Color and font tokens will be overwritten. You'll need to revalidate contrast before publishing again.
design.errorMessage: Could not apply the preset. Please try again.
